name: Guided Fever Module v2 - Kent-style multi-select and toggle answers
new_features: answer buttons toggle select/deselect on repeated click
selected guided findings removable from Case Builder
doctor free text stays editable and is not overwritten
fever disease confirmation expanded with Kent fever/chill/sweat questions
fever remedy selection expanded with broader therapeutic fever remedy groups
source_note: Fever questions follow Kent Section 33 Fever, Chill and Sweat plus clinical red-flag/differential prompts. Buttons add descriptive facts, not simple yes/no.
